title: Minecraft Add
description: This mod adds more interesting items to Minecraft
body:
The following items are added to this mod:

NO.1: Dirt tools and armor, no special skills at the moment

NO.2: Terracotta tools, fired from clay tools, excavation level 2

No.3:copper tools and armor

NO.4: Obsidian tools and armor, of which [Obsidian Pickaxe] can be combined with 4 [Obsidian] Discord to craft 1 [Bedrock Shard]

NO.5: Bedrock tools and armor, in which [Bedrock Pickaxe] right-click on bedrock to collect [Bedrock] and enter 250 ticks of cooldown. [Bedrock Sword] right-click air to generate a [Bedrock] block under your feet, cooldown: 400 ticks

NO.6: 4 [Sticks] can be combined into 2 [Oak Planks], 4 [Planks] can be combined into 1 [Oak Log]

NO.7: Heart of the World: Right-click the block to consume itself and replace the block with [Command Block], which is used to craft [Origin Artifact]

The progress added to this module is as follows:

NO.1: "More Equipment": The initial progress of this mod is achieved after picking up 1 [Dirt].

NO.2: "Poor to Eat Soil": Achieved after picking up 1 [Dirt], 20 experience points will be awarded

NO.3: "Unstable Tools": Achieved after obtaining a full set of dirt tools and armor, 30 experience points will be awarded

NO.4: "Tools Stronger Than Diamonds": Achieved after obtaining a full set of obsidian tools and armor, 150 experience points will be awarded

NO.5: "Eternal Tools": Achieved after obtaining a full set of bedrock tools and armor, 500 experience points will be awarded

NO.6: "World Core": Achieved after obtaining [Heart of the World], the experience point is 999

NO.7: "The Return of the Emperor": Achieved after obtaining [Enchanted Golden Apple], rewarding experience points of 300

PS: 1.8.0 and above continue to improve. It is not recommended by authors below 1.8.0, they are considered imperfect and wrong. The author is not responsible for them

This mod is made using MCreator, please forgive me

Changed its name to Minecraft Add in 11.2

For Chinese(写给中国人):

如果你想赞助或查看各版本的详细区别，请打开下方链接
